title: Generate R program for 14-3.02 Change from Baseline Over Time

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using rtables or Tplyr to generate 14-3.02: Change from Baseline Over Time. The program must: (1) Read ADADAS dataset, (2) Filter to Efficacy population, (3) Implement analysis: visit-wise change from baseline with standard errors, confidence intervals, and treatment comparisons, (4) Format table with treatment group columns (Placebo, Xanomeline Low, Xanomeline High), (5) Output as RTF document matching mock shell layout.
